scripts.build: npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=lib/index.js --sourcemap --format=cjs --external:firebase-functions --external:firebase-admin --external:@supabase/supabase-js --external:googleapis --external:tsdav --external:cors --external:express && npx esbuild src/supabase.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node24 --outfile=lib/supabase.js --sourcemap --format=cjs --external:@supabase/supabase-js
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions
scripts.predeploy:check:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src=fs.readFileSync('src/index.ts','utf8');const lines=src.split('
');const bad=[];lines.forEach((l,i)=>{if(/localhost/.test(l)&&/redirect|frontendUrl|REDIRECT_URI|FRONTEND_URL/.test(l))bad.push('L'+(i+1)+': '+l.trim())});if(bad.length){console.error('ERROR: localhost in redirect/URL lines:
'+bad.join('
'));process.exit(1)}else{console.log('OK: No localhost in redirect/URL code')}"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run predeploy:check && firebase deploy --only functions
